# Let's try to open the expected file names and display content for internal analysis.
import os, textwrap, json, re, sys, unicodedata, pathlib

candidates = [
    "/mnt/data/text_to_analyse.txt",
    "text_to_analyse.txt",
    "/mnt/data/file-FamRgrT6KqjjPPkVTKEjz7-text_to_analyse.txt",
]

path_used = None
content = None
for p in candidates:
    if os.path.exists(p):
        path_used = p
        with open(p, "rb") as f:
            raw_bytes = f.read()
        try:
            content = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8')
        except UnicodeDecodeError:
            content = raw_bytes.decode('utf-8', errors='replace')
        break

path_used, len(content) if content is not None else None

raw = content

# Define intended spans as they appear inside quotes (we'll verify they exist).
span1 = "قُلْ إِنَّمَا أَنَا عَبْدُ اللهِ فَأَسْلِمُوا إِلَى رَبِّكُمْ إِنَّهُ مَغْفِرٌ لِلْغُفَّارِينَ"
span2 = "إِنَّمَا أَنَا نَذِيرٌ مُبَشِّرٌ"
span3 = "قالوا: يا عيسى، أَتَدْعُو إِلَى إِلَهٍ غَيْرِ اللهِ؟ قال: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ مِنْ شَرِّ ذَلِكَ"

for i, s in enumerate([span1, span2, span3], 1):
    idx = raw.find(s)
    print(i, idx, 'found' if idx != -1 else 'NOT found')

spans = [
    (77, 171, span1, "Aya"),
    (342, 374, span2, "Aya"),
    (603, 694, span3, "Hadeeth"),
]

# Validate exact match with raw string and ensure trimmed edges are not quotes/punct/trimmable
trim_chars = set(list(" \n\r\t\u200f\u200e\"'«»()[]{}<>،؛:.,!؟?…ـ"))
def is_trimmable(c):
    return c in trim_chars

def check_span(raw, start, end, text):
    assert raw[start:end] == text, "Text mismatch"
    # check char before/after in context
    before = raw[start-1] if start > 0 else ''
    after = raw[end] if end < len(raw) else ''
    return before, after

for s in spans:
    b, a = check_span(raw, s[0], s[1], s[2])
    print(s[2][:10], "ok, before:", repr(b), "after:", repr(a), "| before trimmable:", b in trim_chars, "after trimmable:", a in trim_chars)
